ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date of traffic data collection */,
  "from_time" TEXT /* Start time of traffic data collection */,
  "to_time" TEXT /* End time of traffic data collection */,
  "jaggedness" REAL /* Jaggedness of traffic flow */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of traffic coverage */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of traffic congestion */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that captured the data */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles detected */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles */,
  "occupancy" REAL /* Percentage of road occupancy */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during data collection */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., traffic speed, volume, occupancy) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor (e.g., road name, intersection) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of sensor installation */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera (e.g., traffic monitoring, surveillance) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the camera (e.g., road name, intersection) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of camera installation */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the camera */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the camera */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the camera */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic pattern entry */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date of traffic pattern prediction */,
  "from_time" TEXT /* Start time of traffic pattern prediction */,
  "to_time" TEXT /* End time of traffic pattern prediction */,
  "predicted_jaggedness" REAL /* Predicted jaggedness of traffic flow */,
  "predicted_area" REAL /* Predicted area of traffic coverage */,
  "predicted_score" REAL /* Predicted score of traffic congestion */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for prediction */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly entry */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date of anomaly detection */,
  "from_time" TEXT /* Start time of anomaly detection */,
  "to_time" TEXT /* End time of anomaly detection */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., traffic congestion, accident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly */,
  "impact_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the anomaly */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the anomaly */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the anomaly */,
  "responsibility_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for handling the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, transportation planner, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the traffic data */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date of sensor reading */,
  "reading" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the sensor reading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera feed */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that collected the feed */,
  "dt" TEXT /* Date of camera feed */,
  "feed" TEXT /* URL or file path to the camera feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of feed (e.g., live, recorded) */,
  "feed_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the feed */,
  "feed_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_feeds_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)
